patch.value: Independent verification of the 2026-05-31 ecosystem living-map (milestone pm-doxj): adversarially re-check the 78 open backlog items + closed ADRs/audit artifacts for (1) duplicates vs each other and vs the 902-item closed history, (2) ecosystem coverage gaps (code/docs/tests/CI/packages/SDK not represented), (3) hierarchy + dependency linkage soundness, (4) item-definition quality. Specialized sub-agents run read-only domain re-reviews, record work in pm, and propose dedup-checked gap items synthesized centrally.

Sub-agents complete independent read-only re-review tracked in pm (comments/learnings/files on per-agent subtasks); duplicates and coverage gaps reported; genuine gaps filled as well-defined dedup-checked open items; NO existing closed item modified; pm health/validate stay ok; CHANGELOG regenerated last.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Verification pass complete. 3 specialized sub-agents ran independent read-only re-review, each tracking work in pm: pm-f6rm (dedup & definition quality), pm-xmhn (ecosystem coverage), pm-uid0 (hierarchy/deps/ADR coverage). Result: backlog confirmed dedup-clean (no true duplicates among the 78 open items or vs the 902 closed history; the 14 Story<->Feature pairs are correct need+deliverable PM, not dups). Caught and rejected one FALSE POSITIVE: pm-uid0 reported the 24 ADRs as unparented; direct file + pm get + pm list --parent verification proved they ARE parented to pm-m2u1 (no action taken). Definition quality assessed unusually strong (100% of non-epic items carry acceptance_criteria; all epics carry goal/objective/value; zero orphans).

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Actions applied centrally (create-only / open-item edits only; no pre-existing closed item modified): (1) re-parented ADR-log epic pm-m2u1 -> milestone pm-doxj; (2) refined Story pm-fhsg acceptance_criteria to be outcome-focused, removing verbatim overlap with implementing task pm-22x2; (3) added 9 dependency edges: pm-exrw depends_on pm-nf2q (hard prerequisite), plus related edges 4gw6->nf2q, 1h99->i17g, 0hnu->6m3y, mnee->3pbq, kfd8->{bqpg,7m8p,13bn}, puvn->mnee; (4) created 3 missing ADRs under pm-m2u1: pm-i7i4 (git-native filesystem as the database), pm-12j1 (collision-checked random short-ID scheme), pm-irp1 (startup-latency strategy); (5) created chore pm-g3xl (drift-lock the third marketplace manifest .agents/plugins/marketplace.json).

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Independent verification earns its keep: agent-3 confidently listed 24 ADR IDs as parent=None, but the ADRs were correctly parented all along (the agent likely mis-parsed pm get output). Always confirm a sub-agent finding against the source-of-truth files before mutating closed items - re-parenting closed ADRs would have been needless churn.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: The 3rd marketplace manifest .agents/plugins/marketplace.json (name pm-local) is NOT covered by tests/integration/claude-plugin-contract.spec.ts, which only reconciles root marketplace.json <-> .claude-plugin/marketplace.json (line 140). Verified directly - real drift-protection gap, filed as pm-g3xl.
